---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a scan profile, command, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of the problem. e.g. "App X leaves gigabytes of cache in …"

## Proposed solution
What you'd like maclean to do.

## Which profile does this apply to?
e.g. Developer, Video Editor, Designer, Everyone…

## Cache / data location (if known)
e.g. `~/Library/Caches/SomeApp`

## Additional context
Anything else, screenshots, etc.
